prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical street-fashion/cosplay photograph set in Ikebukuro Station East Exit, Tokyo on a clear sunny day. The scene shows a busy Japanese city sidewalk in Ikebukuro with tall commercial buildings, dense vertical shop signs, pedestrians, traffic, street trees, yellow tactile paving, and a prominent blue station sign in the upper left reading “Ikebukuro Sta. E.” with Japanese characters above it; beneath it is a white arrow sign reading “Sunshine-dori Ave.” Include recognizable urban details such as the LABI Ikebukuro building sign in the distance and colorful karaoke/retail signage. In the foreground, a single adult woman cosplayer walks confidently toward the camera on the sidewalk, centered slightly right, wearing ornate medieval fantasy knight armor: polished dark-silver plate armor with engraved details, articulated gauntlets, breastplate, shoulder armor, thigh and shin guards, black boots, and a long dark cloak or split skirt flowing behind her. She has long wavy blonde hair catching the sunlight, while her face is intentionally obscured by a smooth neutral blur with no facial features. The mood is a believable candid city snapshot where an elaborate fantasy armored cosplayer blends into everyday Ikebukuro foot traffic. Use realistic natural daylight, crisp shadows, documentary photography, 35mm street-photo perspective, high detail, true-to-life colors, no illustration style, no extra fantasy effects, no weapons, no watermark.
